[Western Baltic] GERMAN NAV WARN 204/26
WESTERN BALTIC. EAST OF KADETRENDEN.
SURVEY OPERATIONS BY 'NORTHERN STORM/MISA7',
COMMENCING IN POSITION 54-35,7N 012-33,8E
VESSEL WILL BE CROSSING TSS ON POSITION 54-52,8N 013-02,4E
RESTRICTED MANOEVRABILITY DURING OPERATIONS.
BERTH OF 500 METERS REQUESTED.
CANCEL GERMAN NAV WARN 188/26
